message:
refactor(mux-client): replace ambient task spawning with scoped Cx
subscription tasks

Consolidate pane output subscription task spawning to always use
cx::spawn_with_cx (scoped context) instead of task::spawn (ambient),
eliminating the SubscriptionTask::Ambient variant entirely:

- Remove SubscriptionTask::Ambient variant; only Scoped remains
- Simplify join_subscription_task to destructure single variant
- Extract spawn_subscription_task_with_cx() helper for consistent
  task creation across all three subscription entry points
- Extract inherited_subscription_runtime_handle() that uses the new
  current_runtime_handle() accessor instead of relying on ambient
  runtime context from task::spawn
- subscribe_pane_output_with_inherited_cx: use scoped spawning via
  the inherited runtime handle
- subscribe_pane_output: use scoped spawning with for_request() Cx
- Narrow task import to #[cfg(any(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"), test))]

Tests:
- Add connect_with_cx_times_out_when_server_stalls_during_codec_handshake
  test for Cx-aware connection timeout behavior
- Add additional subscription lifecycle tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
